criteria.name: AI Integration
criteria.description: The extent to which the app utilizes artificial intelligence to enhance learning experiences.
criteria.sources: App descriptions, developer documentation, user reviews.

criteria.name: User Engagement
criteria.description: Measures how effectively the app engages users through interactive and personalized content.
criteria.sources: User reviews, engagement metrics, app analytics.

criteria.name: Educational Value
criteria.description: Assesses the quality and depth of educational content provided by the app.
criteria.sources: Educational expert reviews, curriculum alignment, content quality assessments.

criteria.name: User Satisfaction
criteria.description: Overall user satisfaction based on ratings and reviews.
criteria.sources: App store ratings, user feedback, review aggregators.

criteria.name: Accessibility
criteria.description: The app's availability across different platforms and its inclusivity features.
criteria.sources: Platform availability, accessibility features documentation, user feedback.
